fallback_templates.reorder_now: Reorder now because projected stock lasts {days_remaining:.1f} days and supplier lead time is {lead_time} days.
fallback_templates.reorder_later: Reorder later. Current stock covers {days_remaining:.1f} days, which exceeds lead time of {lead_time} days, but will drop below safe level soon.
fallback_templates.do_not_reorder: Do not reorder because current stock is sufficient for expected usage before expiry.
fallback_templates.waste_risk: High waste risk because projected usage before expiry ({projected_usage:.1f} {unit}) is lower than current stock ({current_stock} {unit}).
fallback_templates.no_usage: Insufficient usage data to compute a reliable recommendation. Showing safe default.
fallback_templates.expired: Item has already expired. Consider removing from inventory.
